basic_details.job_title: Anna University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Associate I / Project Technician Posts
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Project Associate I / Project Technician Notification 2026 has been released on 11 July 2026 on the official website of Anna University. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Anna University Project Associate I / Project Technician Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech/M.Sc./M.E./M.Tech, Diploma in Engg or ITI
qualification.details: Project Associate I: B.E./B.Tech/M.Sc./M.E./M.Tech (Desirable: Degree in Mechanical, Civil, Aerospace, Polymers, Materials with strong knowledge in FEA and proven proficiency in ANSYS and/or Abaqus and experience in modeling composites) Project Technician: Diploma in Engg or ITI (Desirable: Draftsman with knowledge in CAD software - Solidworks, Creo, CATIA, Autodesk, Fusion 360)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.annauniv.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Anna University Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download Anna University Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.anna_university: B.E./B.Tech/M.Sc./M.E./M.Tech, Diploma in Engg or ITI

content_sections.heading: Anna University Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Anna University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Anna University Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Associate I: B.E./B.Tech/M.Sc./M.E./M.Tech (Desirable: Degree in Mechanical, Civil, Aerospace, Polymers, Materials with strong knowledge in FEA and proven proficiency in ANSYS and/or Abaqus and experience in modeling composites) Project Technician: Diploma in Engg or ITI (Desirable: Draftsman with knowledge in CAD software - Solidworks, Creo, CATIA, Autodesk, Fusion 360)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://www.annauniv.edu. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What are the posts available in Anna University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Anna University is recruiting for the posts of Project Associate I and Project Technician. These contractual positions offer an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are released in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced in the Anna University Recruitment 2026. One vacancy each for Project Associate I and Project Technician posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for Anna University Project Associate I / Project Technician posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for these positions is 03 August 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application for Anna University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Anna University Project Associate I / Project Technician recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download, fill, and send the form by post.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: For Project Associate I, candidates need B.E./B.Tech/M.Sc./M.E./M.Tech. For Project Technician, a Diploma in Engg or ITI is required. Specific desirable qualifications are also mentioned.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for Anna University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Anna University Project Associate I / Project Technician posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for Project Associate I post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Associate I post is Rs. 35,000 per month. For Project Technician, it is Rs. 20,000 per month, making it a well-paid opportunity.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Anna University Project Associate I / Project Technician posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts primarily involves an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their applications and called for an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for these posts?
faq.answer: The job location for the Project Associate I / Project Technician posts is Chennai, Tamil Nadu. This offers an opportunity to work in a prominent educational institution.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Anna University?
faq.answer: The official website for Anna University, where candidates can find more details and download the application form, is https://www.annauniv.edu. All updates will be posted there.
